form_testing.description: Testing all input forms for validation, security, and data handling

security_url_testing.description: Testing authentication, authorization, and API security

e2e_flow_testing.description: Testing complete user workflows and data isolation

test_cases.Test Objective: Verify login form accepts valid citizen credentials
test_cases.Preconditions: User exists in database with valid credentials
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request with valid email, password, userType
test_cases.Test Data: Email: ali.raza@example.pk, Password: demo123, UserType: citizen
test_cases.Expected Result: Status 200, Returns user object with id, name, email, userType

test_cases.Test Objective: Verify login form rejects invalid credentials
test_cases.Preconditions: User does not exist in database
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request with non-existent email

test_cases.Test Objective: Verify login form blocks SQL injection attempts
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request with SQL injection payload

test_cases.Test Objective: Verify signup form sanitizes XSS attempts
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request with XSS payload in name field
3. Verify payload is sanitized or rejected
test_cases.Expected Result: XSS payload sanitized (< > converted to entities) or rejected
test_cases.Notes: CRITICAL: XSS vulnerability - script tags not sanitized!

test_cases.Test Case Title: Case Creation Form - Empty Required Fields
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify case creation validates required fields
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request to /api/cases with empty title/description

test_cases.Test Case Title: Case Creation Form - Very Long Input (Buffer Overflow Test)
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify system handles very long inputs safely
test_cases.Expected Result: Either accepts with length limit or rejects with 413/400

test_cases.Test Case Title: Document Generation - Special Characters in Placeholders
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify document generation sanitizes special characters
Test Steps: 3. Verify document generates and chars are escaped
test_cases.Expected Result: Status 200, Document generated with sanitized content

test_cases.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Citizen accessing Lawyer routes
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify citizens cannot access lawyer-only routes
test_cases.Notes: CRITICAL: Citizen can access lawyer data!

test_cases.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Lawyer accessing Admin routes
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify lawyers cannot access admin-only routes
test_cases.Notes: CRITICAL: Lawyer can access admin routes!

test_cases.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Unauthenticated access to protected routes
test_cases.Notes: CRITICAL: Some protected routes accessible without auth!

test_cases.Test Case Title: API Security - SQL Injection on Case Endpoint
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify API endpoints block SQL injection attempts
Test Steps: 1. Send SQL injection payloads in query parameters
test_cases.Test Data: ["1' OR '1'='1", '1; DROP TABLE cases--', "' UNION SELECT * FROM users--"]
test_cases.Expected Result: All SQL injection attempts blocked or return errors
test_cases.Actual Result: Payload '1' OR '1'='1': Status 200; Payload '1; DROP TABLE cases--': Status 200; Payload '' UNION SELECT * FROM users--': Status 200

test_cases.Test Objective: Verify CORS configuration is not overly permissive
Test Steps: 1. Send request with Origin header from external site
test_cases.Notes: WARNING: CORS allows all origins - security risk!

test_cases.Test Case Title: E2E User Flow - Complete Citizen Journey
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify complete citizen workflow from login to document generation
test_cases.Test Data: Complete citizen workflow with bail case
test_cases.Expected Result: All steps complete successfully: Login → Case → Analysis → Lawyers → Document
test_cases.Actual Result: 1. Login successful; Failed at: Case creation failed: 422

test_cases.Test Case Title: E2E User Flow - Lawyer Client Management
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify complete lawyer workflow for client management
Test Steps: 4. Retrieve all clients to verify data persistence
test_cases.Expected Result: All steps complete: Login → Add Client → Create Case → View Clients
test_cases.Actual Result: 1. Lawyer login successful; Failed at: Client creation failed: 422

test_cases.Test Case Title: E2E Data Isolation - Citizen A cannot see Citizen B's data
test_cases.Test Objective: Verify data isolation between different citizen users
Test Steps: 2. Create private case as Citizen A
3. Attempt to access Citizen A's case with different user ID
4. Verify access denied or data not visible
test_cases.Expected Result: Citizen B cannot see or access Citizen A's cases
test_cases.Actual Result: 1. Citizen A logged in; Error: Case creation failed

critical_findings.Test Objective: Verify signup form sanitizes XSS attempts
Test Steps: 2. Send POST request with XSS payload in name field
3. Verify payload is sanitized or rejected
critical_findings.Expected Result: XSS payload sanitized (< > converted to entities) or rejected
critical_findings.Notes: CRITICAL: XSS vulnerability - script tags not sanitized!

critical_findings.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Citizen accessing Lawyer routes
critical_findings.Test Objective: Verify citizens cannot access lawyer-only routes
critical_findings.Notes: CRITICAL: Citizen can access lawyer data!

critical_findings.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Lawyer accessing Admin routes
critical_findings.Test Objective: Verify lawyers cannot access admin-only routes
critical_findings.Notes: CRITICAL: Lawyer can access admin routes!

critical_findings.Test Case Title: URL Access Control - Unauthenticated access to protected routes
critical_findings.Notes: CRITICAL: Some protected routes accessible without auth!

critical_findings.Test Case Title: E2E Data Isolation - Citizen A cannot see Citizen B's data
critical_findings.Test Objective: Verify data isolation between different citizen users
Test Steps: 2. Create private case as Citizen A
3. Attempt to access Citizen A's case with different user ID
4. Verify access denied or data not visible
critical_findings.Expected Result: Citizen B cannot see or access Citizen A's cases
critical_findings.Actual Result: 1. Citizen A logged in; Error: Case creation failed

recommendations.recommendation: Address all critical failures immediately before production deployment
Implement input sanitization and output encoding
Implement proper role-based access control (RBAC) at API level
Implement proper role-based access control (RBAC) at API level
Implement proper role-based access control (RBAC) at API level
